subjects.description: A line of bright orange traffic cones with reflective white bands, arranged diagonally to taper off the oncoming lane and merge traffic into the ego vehicle's lane
subjects.appearance_details: Conical PVC cones, weathered orange surface with a single horizontal reflective collar, some lightly dusted with construction grime
subjects.relationship: Define the closed-off oncoming lane and channelize shared traffic; primary objects the ego vehicle's perception system detects
subjects.location: center-right, extending from mid-ground toward the foreground along the lane boundary
subjects.orientation: Standing upright, facing camera as the vehicle approaches
subjects.pose: Static upright placement in a tapering row
subjects.action: Marking the lane shift and channelizing oncoming traffic
subjects.state_changes: Cones grow larger and pass to the right as the ego vehicle advances

subjects.description: An oncoming sedan sharing the ego vehicle's lane as it passes through the narrowed work zone
subjects.appearance_details: Silver mid-size sedan with headlights on, slightly slowing as it approaches the shared section
subjects.relationship: Oncoming traffic temporarily sharing the open lane with the ego vehicle
subjects.location: center background on the open lane
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, approaching head-on within the shared lane
subjects.pose: Moving forward, hugging the right edge of the open lane
subjects.action: Driving cautiously toward the ego vehicle through the work zone
subjects.state_changes: Approaches and grows slightly larger, maintaining safe lateral distance

subjects.description: Orange diamond-shaped construction warning signs mounted on temporary roadside posts
subjects.appearance_details: Fluorescent orange diamond signs with black symbols indicating road work and lane shift ahead
subjects.relationship: Warn drivers of the upcoming construction zone and lane-shift condition
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on portable stands
subjects.state_changes: Passes to the right and out of frame as the vehicle advances

background_setting: A simple rural-suburban two-lane asphalt road with one lane in each direction and no central divider, running through flat open terrain dotted with low grass shoulders and occasional trees. Ahead lies an active construction work zone where the oncoming lane has been closed with orange traffic cones, temporary yellow lane markings reroute both directions of traffic into the ego vehicle's lane, and orange diamond warning signs flank the roadside. The sky is clear blue with bright daytime sun.

lighting.direction: High front-side sunlight from the upper left
lighting.shadows: Consistent, crisp shadows cast to the right of cones, signs, and vehicles
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, high-visibility illumination with vivid colors and strong contrast on reflective surfaces

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing road composition with the lane vanishing point slightly left of center, cones tapering diagonally from mid-ground toward the lower right
aesthetics.color_scheme: Gray asphalt, bright safety orange, yellow lane markings, blue sky, green shoulders
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating diagonal row of evenly spaced orange cones and dashed temporary lane markings

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the vehicle's perspective, smoothly advancing down the lane
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road, cones, lane markings, and oncoming traffic ahead

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS demonstration of work-zone perception and safe lane navigation

actions.description: Ego vehicle travels down the open two-lane road, detecting orange diamond warning signs and the start of the cone line marking the construction zone ahead.
Vehicle reads the altered temporary lane markings and adjusts its trajectory to stay within the open lane as the oncoming lane closes off.
Vehicle smoothly navigates the shared-lane section, passing the cones safely on the right while an oncoming sedan approaches in the same shared lane, maintaining safe distance.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Black uppercase text on fluorescent orange diamond sign
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right roadside mid-ground, visible from 0:00 to 0:02
text_and_signage_elements.context: Warns drivers of the upcoming construction zone

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Black symbol and text on orange diamond sign
text_and_signage_elements.context: Indicates that traffic must shift into the shared open lane

segments.description: Ego vehicle approaches the work zone on the clear two-lane road, with warning signs and the beginning of the cone line coming into view.
segments.key_changes: Construction signage and first cones appear in the mid-ground
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking from the ego viewpoint

segments.description: Vehicle interprets the temporary lane markings and adjusts course to remain within the open lane as the oncoming lane is closed off.
segments.key_changes: Trajectory subtly aligns with the shifted lane
segments.camera: Continued forward motion with slight lateral easing

segments.description: Vehicle navigates the shared section, passing cones on the right and yielding adequate space to an oncoming sedan in the shared lane.
segments.key_changes: Cones pass close to the right; oncoming car approaches and passes safely
segments.camera: Steady forward tracking through the narrowed corridor

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle drives along a sunlit two-lane road and orange diamond construction signs and the first cones appear ahead on the right. By 0:02 the vehicle recognizes the altered temporary lane markings and gently adjusts its path to stay within the open lane as the oncoming lane closes off with cones. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle smoothly threads the shared work-zone corridor, passing the orange cones safely on its right while an oncoming silver sedan approaches in the same shared lane, with the system maintaining a steady, centered, and safe trajectory throughout.
audio_description: Ambient road noise dominates: the steady hum of tires on asphalt and faint wind. Distant low rumble of construction activity and the muffled engine of the oncoming sedan. No speech or music.
